prestazioni: Engine swap to Hyundai/Kia 2.5L Turbo GDI engine (Theta III GDI, engine code *G4KM*) with forged internals (Manley H-beam connecting rods, JE forged pistons, ACL race bearings) and Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing, 62mm compressor wheel) for 450whp on E85 fuel. Paired with a Kia Motorsport 6-speed manual transmission (DCT conversion not recommended due to torque limitations) and OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2.5-way, 45% preload).

Full custom 3-inch turbo-back exhaust system by Armytrix (valvetronic, titanium tips) with Vibrant 1799 high-flow catalytic converters (200-cell) and a custom-tuned ECU flash via K-Tuned K-Pro V4 (specifically mapped for the *G4KM* with flex-fuel sensor integration, 22psi peak boost, and 30° ignition timing advance).

KW Suspension Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable, 8-position rebound, 12-position compression, 20mm ride height adjustment) with polyurethane bushings (SuperPro 62mm front control arm bushings, rear trailing arm bushings) and Cusco front strut tower bar (22mm hollow section, 7000-series aluminum). Brake upgrade to DBA 5000 Series rotors (2-piece, slotted, 345mm front/330mm rear) with AP Racing CP8306-2600 calipers (4-piston front, 2-piston rear) and Motul RBF660 brake fluid.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody conversion kit (specific to 2016-2020 Carens EX, 50mm front/40mm rear fender flares) with custom carbon fiber front splitter (Rocket Bunny-style, 3D-scanned for OEM fitment) and rear diffuser (Seibon carbon fiber, 3-piece design with integrated tow hooks).

OEM+ aggressive styling with Kia Motorsport grille (blacked-out, mesh-style) and custom LED headlight retrofit (Morimoto XB LED projectors, 5500K color temperature, sequential turn signals) with DRL delete. Side skirts from the Kia Stinger GT (modified for Carens EX wheelbase) and rear spoiler from the Kia Optima GT (carbon fiber, 3M 1080 vinyl wrap in Satin Hyper Blue).

Forgeline GA3R wheels (19x9.5 +35 front, 19x10.5 +40 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (255/35/19 front, 285/30/19 rear) and custom center caps (Kia Motorsport logo, anodized gold). Interior overhaul with Recaro Sportster CS seats (heated, Alcantara/leather, 6-point harnesses) and custom roll cage (Chassisworks 8-point, bolt-in, mild steel, powder-coated matte black).
